overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex at night. The character walks through a torch-lit plaza with classical architecture, ascends a grand staircase, explores a columned interior with carved reliefs, and exits back to the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with amphitheater seating and classical columns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the torch-lit plaza toward the temple complex

notable_agents.action: civilian walking across the plaza in white clothing

entered.detail: curved stone seating tiers lining the right side of the plaza
tall stone columns with statues atop them lining the approach
stone pedestals with burning fires providing warm orange light
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
large classical building with columns and stairs at the end of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide torch-lit plaza at night, with curved amphitheater seating on the right and tall classical columns ahead. The camera moves forward through the cobblestone square toward a large temple building, passing palm trees and scattered NPCs walking about.

events.description: large sphinx statue comes into view at the base of the temple stairs

agents.ego_description: circling around the sphinx statue base toward the grand staircase entrance

entered.detail: massive dark stone sphinx statue crouching at the stair base
wide ceremonial stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving into the temple forecourt, the camera circles around a massive sphinx statue at the base of a grand staircase. The amphitheater seating falls behind as the character approaches the wide stone steps leading up to the columned temple entrance.

events.description: begins ascending the grand staircase toward the temple entrance
moon becomes visible through the colonnade opening above

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide marble steps toward the temple entrance, passing under the colonnade

notable_agents.action: temple guard or civilian descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: massive dark stone columns supporting the temple portico overhead
bright full moon visible in the night sky through the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase, with the steps filling the frame as dark stone columns loom ahead. The moon becomes visible through the temple entrance above, and an NPC descends the stairs passing by the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: columned temple interior with carved reliefs

events.description: enters the covered colonnade interior with dark pillars and torchlight
approaches the carved wall with illuminated fire pit at the end of the hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark colonnade examining the architecture and carved walls

entered.detail: large stone wall with intricate Egyptian hieroglyphic reliefs illuminated by fire
burning fire basin in front of the carved wall providing warm light
patterned stone tile flooring with geometric designs

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered temple interior, the camera moves through rows of massive dark columns toward a carved stone wall at the far end. The space is lit by wall-mounted torches and a central fire pit illuminating intricate hieroglyphic reliefs, with patterned mosaic flooring underfoot.

events.description: turns around and exits the colonnade interior back to the staircase overlook

agents.ego_description: turning back and walking out of the temple to overlook the plaza below

notable_agents.action: civilian walking past the camera at the temple exit

entered.detail: view looking back down at the plaza and sphinx from the temple height

segments.scene_description: The character turns and exits the dark interior, emerging back at the top of the grand staircase with a sweeping view of the plaza below. The amphitheater seating is visible in the distance to the left, and torch braziers frame the exit as the camera looks down over the sphinx and the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, torch-lit plaza into the depths of a temple interior before returning to a high vantage point. It begins by gliding across a cobblestone square past palm trees and amphitheater seating, moving steadily toward a massive temple building. As the camera reaches the forecourt, it circles a great sphinx statue and ascends a grand staircase where the moon becomes visible through the looming entrance above. The scene then shifts into the covered interior, passing through rows of dark columns and across mosaic floors toward a fire-lit wall of intricate hieroglyphic reliefs. Finally, the camera turns and exits the dark sanctuary, emerging back onto the stairs to reveal a sweeping nocturnal view of the plaza and sphinx below.
